band_rationale: Medium-low: every stated quality attribute (latency, availability, scalability) is unverifiable and the success criteria are unmeasurable — the spec gives an implementer no target to hit. Ceiling 84 requires those gaps to keep costing at least 16 points; floor 60 leaves room to re-tune all three findings to high severity (36 penalty -> 64). Engine output at labeling time: 76.
note: NFRs (latency/availability/scalability) with no thresholds; non-measurable success. The ambiguous-wording extra is genuine: 'highly scalable' in FR-002 is exactly the vague phrasing the rule exists for.
